---
title: "Other Experiences"
subtitle: "Entrepreneurship, Internships & Learning Experiences"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-title: "Page Sections"
---

## Overview

Beyond formal coursework, my professional development has been shaped by founding and running a startup, holding internship roles across accounting and HR, and engaging in immersive, practice-based learning at DCU. These experiences ground my analytics work in real business reality.

---

## Entrepreneurship

::: {.experience-card .theme-violet}
### Co-Founder — Wrench Mate PVT LTD
- **Role:** Co-Founder (all core functions)
- **Duration:** April 2024 – July 2025
- **Focus:** Mobile app platform — product management, marketing, finance, and client relations

**Key outcomes:**
- 100+ active user accounts acquired
- ₹50,000 recurring monthly revenue secured
- Burn rate held 30% below projections
- 99.9% platform uptime maintained
:::

---

## Professional Internships

::: {.experience-card .theme-ocean}
### Assistant Accounts Intern — Samisthi PVT LTD
- **Role:** Accounts Intern
- **Duration:** June 2023 – August 2023
- **Focus:** Bookkeeping, accounts payable/receivable, audit support, and financial tracking
:::

::: {.experience-card .theme-sunset}
### Human Resources Intern — ITS Planners and Engineers
- **Role:** HR Intern
- **Duration:** June 2022 – August 2022
- **Focus:** Onboarding (10+ full-time, 25+ part-time employees), personnel records management, attendance tracking, and recruitment streamlining
:::

---

## DCU Learning Experiences

::: {.experience-card .theme-aurora}
### VR Lab — Presentation Skills Training
- **Programme:** MSc Business Analytics, Dublin City University
- **Duration:** 2025 – Present
- **Focus:** Using Virtual Reality technology to practise data presentations and pitches in realistic business settings, developing stakeholder communication skills alongside technical analytics
:::

::: {.experience-card .theme-ocean}
### Challenge-Based Learning with Industry Partners
- **Programme:** MSc Business Analytics, Dublin City University
- **Focus:** Applying analytics to real-world business problems through team-based challenge projects, feasibility studies, and client communication exercises — all grounded in SDG-aligned thinking
:::

---

## Timeline Highlights

| Period | Role | Organisation |
|---|---|---|
| 2025–Present | MSc Business Analytics Student | Dublin City University |
| Apr 2024–Jul 2025 | Co-Founder | Wrench Mate PVT LTD |
| Jun–Aug 2023 | Assistant Accounts Intern | Samisthi PVT LTD |
| Jun–Aug 2022 | HR Intern | ITS Planners and Engineers |
| 2024 | BA Business Administration | ICFAI Business School |

---

## Key Skills Developed

| Experience | Skills Gained |
|---|---|
| Co-Founder (Wrench Mate) | P&L management, growth marketing, product lifecycle, decision-making under uncertainty |
| Accounts Intern | Financial reconciliation, audit support, stakeholder communication |
| HR Intern | Talent acquisition, confidentiality, workforce analytics |
| VR Lab (DCU) | Data storytelling, executive presentation, audience awareness |
| Challenge-Based Learning | CRISP-DM, client communication, SDG-aligned analytics |

---

## Reflection

:::: {.callout-note title="Growth Through Real Experience"}
Starting and running Wrench Mate taught me something no course could fully replicate: **decision-making under uncertainty with real consequences**. When every rupee spent matters and every user lost is a signal, you develop an instinct for prioritisation that sharpens every subsequent analysis. My internship experiences reinforced that data only becomes value when it is communicated clearly and acted upon. These experiences now inform how I approach analytics — not as an academic exercise, but as a practical tool for solving genuine business problems.
::::
